'''ngazuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cedazuridine|cedazuridine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-z-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cedazuridine|cedazuridine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngazuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæziyith|ngæziyith]] || [[word:ngæziyij|ngæziyij]] || [[word:ngæziyish|ngæziyish]] || [[word:ngæziyi|ngæziyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngazuzuyuth|ngazuzuyuth]] || [[word:ngazuzuyuj|ngazuzuyuj]] || [[word:ngazuzuyush|ngazuzuyush]] || [[word:ngazuzuyu|ngazuzuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngazuyuth|ngazuyuth]] || [[word:ngazuyuj|ngazuyuj]] || [[word:ngazuyush|ngazuyush]] || [[word:ngazuyu|ngazuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngazufyuth|ngazufyuth]] || [[word:ngazufyuj|ngazufyuj]] || [[word:ngazufyush|ngazufyush]] || [[word:ngazufyuf|ngazufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngazuyuthu|ngazuyuthu]] || [[word:ngazuyuju|ngazuyuju]] || [[word:ngazuyushu|ngazuyushu]] || [[word:ngazuyuku|ngazuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngazuyuth|ngazuyuth]] || [[word:ngazuyuj|ngazuyuj]] || [[word:ngazuyush|ngazuyush]] || [[word:ngazuyu|ngazuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngazuyuthul|ngazuyuthul]] || [[word:ngazuyujul|ngazuyujul]] || [[word:ngazuyushul|ngazuyushul]] || [[word:ngazuyukul|ngazuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngazuyuthuthu|ngazuyuthuthu]] || [[word:ngazuyujuju|ngazuyujuju]] || [[word:ngazuyushushu|ngazuyushushu]] || [[word:ngazuyuku|ngazuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngazuyuthun|ngazuyuthun]] || [[word:ngazuyujun|ngazuyujun]] || [[word:ngazuyushun|ngazuyushun]] || [[word:ngazuyukun|ngazuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngazuyuthuoro|ngazuyuthuoro]] || [[word:ngazuyujuoro|ngazuyujuoro]] || [[word:ngazuyushuoro|ngazuyushuoro]] || [[word:ngazuyukuoro|ngazuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
